name: The Exit 8
description:
​

From the doujin Hachiban Deguchi | The Exit 8 by Velzhe

​

​

The doujin is based on the game The Exit 8, where you are stuck in this Japanese metro station passageway. The passageway you walk through is essentially infinite, looping back on itself with a chance of an anomaly occurring that's not present in the original hallway. These anomalies, or differences, can vary from being very subtle to prevalent. In order to leave the passageway, you must go backward when there is an anomaly present and forward if there isn't. If done correctly, then the exit sign will slowly count up to 8, at which point you can leave the passageway, otherwise, it resets back to 0.
​

Fortunately, it seems this place is mostly harmless so far, the first 'person' you've seen doesn't seem to even notice you exist. Probably not the same for anything else lurking here. Check out the personality for the possible anomalies.

​

​

Starting Messages

1 - (Bot Image) You woke up in this mysterious area and see a student walk by you.

2 - (Image) Same scenario, but a different woman wearing pigtails and an erotic version of a sailor uniform.

3 - Create your own.

​​

Tried with Gemini 2.5 and 3.0 Flash and Deepseek RT2 Chimera

Update: Added more anomalies and an empty scenario. Tried to make this bot with the use of advanced scripts, though it failed as the ai refused to listen most of the time, and if it did, it would forget about it right after. It also made them always skip Exit 1, even Gemini 3.0. The script is still in the character if you wanna try it. Next bot's prolly a chaquetrix one

tags: exit 8, emotionless, liminal space, ignored, frozen, stopped, anomalies
creator: Neko Neko
